response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial contributions via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — critical for this role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems programming ability, but the absence of proven work with routing tiles, map optimization, or real-time traffic integration raises significant gaps.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world usage
Demonstrated systems-level programming with DLang and low-latency systems
Strong track record in testing, CI/CD, and cross-stack problem solving
concerns: No explicit C++ or Rust experience in commercial routing or navigation systems
Lacks demonstrated experience with routing tiling, map data optimization, or geospatial pipelines
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not aligned with C++-centric role requirements
